name: Squeaky Clean Credit Consulting
description_short: Squeaky Clean Credit Consulting is a credit repair provider based in Jacksonville, Florida. Rated 5.0/5 with 20 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Squeaky Clean Credit Consulting is a credit repair provider serving clients in Jacksonville, Florida. Carrying a 5.0/5.0 Google rating from 20 reviews, Squeaky Clean Credit Consulting has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Jacksonville area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Squeaky Clean Credit Consulting specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Jacksonville, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Squeaky Clean Credit Consulting operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Jacksonville, Florida area who are considering Squeaky Clean Credit Consulting should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
